items.title: Redirect p99 < 50 ms
items.desc: From the moment a browser sends GET /:slug to the moment it gets a 302 response — under 50 ms at the 99th percentile, measured from the same region as the VPS.

items.title: Survives reboot + buffered writes
items.desc: All link state in durable storage before any 200 is returned to the creator. Analytics events are buffered locally and replayed if the analytics backend is briefly unreachable.
items.art: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 60' style='width:90%;height:auto'><use href='arch:api' x='2' y='10' width='26' height='16'/><line x1='28' y1='18' x2='40' y2='18' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.2'/><polygon points='36,15 40,18 36,21' fill='var(--accent)'/><use href='arch:database' x='42' y='10' width='26' height='16'/><text x='34' y='10' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.8' fill='var(--accent)' text-anchor='middle'>fsync</text><line x1='68' y1='18' x2='80' y2='18' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.2'/><polygon points='76,15 80,18 76,21' fill='var(--accent)'/><text x='91' y='15' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='5' fill='var(--accent)' text-anchor='middle'>200</text><text x='91' y='22' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.5' fill='var(--ink-3)' text-anchor='middle'>OK</text><line x1='15' y1='32' x2='15' y2='40' stroke='var(--ink-3)' stroke-width='0.6'/><polygon points='12,38 15,42 18,38' fill='var(--ink-3)'/><rect x='2' y='42' width='40' height='12' fill='none' stroke='var(--ink-3)' stroke-width='0.6' stroke-dasharray='2 2'/><text x='22' y='50' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='4' fill='var(--ink-3)' text-anchor='middle'>buffer · replay on retry</text><line x1='42' y1='48' x2='54' y2='48' stroke='var(--ink-3)' stroke-width='0.6' stroke-dasharray='2 2'/><polygon points='50,45 54,48 50,51' fill='var(--ink-3)'/><use href='arch:metric' x='56' y='40' width='22' height='14'/></svg>

items.title: No PII storage
items.desc: IP addresses are SHA-256 hashed with a per-instance salt before any write. No cookies on the redirect path. No third party scripts ever in the dashboard.
items.art: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 60' style='width:90%;height:auto'><text x='6' y='18' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='5' fill='var(--ink-2)'>203.0.113.42</text><text x='6' y='24' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.5' fill='var(--ink-3)'>(raw IP, never stored)</text><line x1='40' y1='17' x2='54' y2='17' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.2'/><polygon points='50,14 54,17 50,20' fill='var(--accent)'/><use href='arch:secret' x='34' y='22' width='28' height='14'/><text x='48' y='40' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.8' fill='var(--accent)' text-anchor='middle'>SHA-256 + salt</text><line x1='64' y1='17' x2='78' y2='17' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.2'/><polygon points='74,14 78,17 74,20' fill='var(--accent)'/><text x='98' y='14' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.5' fill='var(--accent)' text-anchor='end'>a3f8…91c</text><text x='98' y='20' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.2' fill='var(--ink-3)' text-anchor='end'>(stored)</text><line x1='4' y1='48' x2='96' y2='48' stroke='var(--ink-3)' stroke-width='0.4' stroke-dasharray='1.5 1.5'/><text x='6' y='56' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.8' fill='var(--ink-3)'>no cookies · no 3rd-party scripts</text></svg>

items.title: One binary, one config
items.desc: Single static Go binary plus one TOML config file. No external dependencies for the redirect path (cache is in-process by default; external cache is opt-in).
